info.title: Owostack API
info.description: Unified billing, entitlements, and usage metering API. Owostack sits between your app and payment providers (Paystack, Stripe, Dodo, Polar) to handle subscriptions, feature gating, metered usage, credit systems, and invoicing.

tags.name: Catalog
tags.description: Sync features and plans from code

post.summary: Subscribe a customer to a plan
post.description: Creates or switches a subscription for a customer. Handles free plans, upgrades, downgrades, and new subscriptions. Returns a checkout URL if payment is required.

post.summary: Generate checkout for a pending subscription
post.description: Generates a payment checkout URL for an existing pending subscription. Useful for collecting payment details before activating.

callbackUrl.description: Redirect URL after successful payment setup

activatedDirectly.description: True if the plan was free and was activated immediately without checkout.

post.description: Manually marks a pending subscription as active without a checkout. Bypasses payment requirements. Typically used for offline sales or full 100% discounts.
Check whether a customer is allowed to use a feature and get current usage/limits. Optionally track usage atomically if allowed via `sendEvent`.
Record usage for metered billing. Handles limit enforcement, add-on credit fallback, and overage tracking.
Purchase a credit pack add-on for a customer. Returns a checkout URL for payment.

200.description: Checkout created for credit pack purchase

get.description: Get all saved payment methods for a customer, including the default card.

post.description: Generate a checkout URL for the customer to authorize a card for future payments.
Remove a saved payment method from a customer's wallet.

get.description: Get unbilled billable usage for a customer with estimated costs per feature, including package, graduated, and volume pricing.

post.description: Generate an invoice for unbilled overage usage.

get.description: List all invoices for a customer.

post.description: Pay an invoice via auto-charge (if card on file) or checkout URL fallback.
Push features, plans, and credit systems from your code to Owostack. Creates missing resources, updates existing ones, never deletes.

get.description: List all plans for the organization with optional filters.
Retrieve a single plan with all its features.

post.description: Create a new customer or return an existing one matched by email or ID. Updates metadata if the customer already exists.
Add a new entity (seat, team member, etc.) scoped to a feature. Enforces plan limits.

get.description: List entities for a customer, optionally filtered by feature.

post.description: Mark an entity for removal. It enters `pending_removal` status and is fully removed at the end of the billing period.

get.description: List all credit systems and their feature mappings.

post.description: Endpoint for receiving webhooks from payment providers. Configure this URL in your provider's dashboard.
